Day advanced to 2026-03-01.
6,954 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
109 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 4 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-02): ['297818', '584240', '656436', '759458']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-28 -> 2026-03-01)

- "Which country's fruit exporters will be reported as facing mounting losses from shipping disruption caused by the US-Israel war on Iran by March 17, 2026?" → South Africa

- "Which city, besides Islamabad, will the Taliban claim to have targeted in Pakistan's March 2026 drone attacks, by mid-March 2026?" → Rawalpindi
- "Which country, besides Saudi Arabia, will Germany say by March 3, 2026, that it is sending chartered planes to for evacuating particularly vulnerable people?" → Oman
- "By March 3, 2026, which country will be identified as having mistakenly shot down three US F-15E fighter jets during an Iranian attack?" → Kuwait
- "What location will be reported as suffering extensive damage from Iranian missiles by March 2026 in the Gulf energy strike?" → Ras Laffan
- "What broadcaster’s headquarters will Israel say it struck and dismantled by 3 March 2026?" → IRIB

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (221 resolved, 109 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
